name: Route Planner (OpenRouteService)
description: Plan hiking, cycling, and walking routes with GPX output, geocoding, POI search, elevation profiles, and isochrones (OpenRouteService + BRouter)

tools.name: plan_route
tools.description: Plan a route with directions and GPX (ORS)

tools.name: plan_route_outdoor
tools.description: Plan hiking/cycling route with best track quality (BRouter)

tools.name: search_place
tools.description: Geocode a place name to coordinates

tools.name: find_pois
tools.description: Find points of interest near a location

tools.name: get_isochrone
tools.description: Get reachability area from a point

tools.name: optimize_route
tools.description: Optimize waypoint order for multi-stop trips

author: freddy-schuetz
